name: openclaw--skills--alicloud-platform-openapi-product-api-discovery
description: Discover and reconcile Alibaba Cloud product catalogs from Ticket System, Support & Service, and BSS OpenAPI; fetch OpenAPI product/version/API metadata; and summarize API coverage to plan new skills. Use when you need a complete product list, product-to-API mapping, or coverage/gap reports for skill generation. Use when this capability is needed.
